name: How to Treat your Dragons - V1
description:
In Erondrae, there are two things that you need to treasure. Your life and the dragons protecting it.

Destiny finds us all eventually. And so it does you this day. The Erondrae dragon stables need a new owner. Someone to take care of its inhabitants. Those inhabitants though aren't the usual mounts you find in other stables. They are dragons. Some ferocious, some childish, some grim others playful. All of them, however, are needed and have to be kept happy. This is where you come in.

The mood of a dragon is fickle. They are moody, arrogant, stubborn and eccentric. To get one of them to do as you ask, they have to be appeased. And you have been put in charge of a whole stable full of them.

It's your responsibility to keep them fed, happy, entertained and satisfied in order for them to help the people of the surrounding lands with their powers. Form trust, friendships and maybe even romances with them. Dragons are very much capable of love after all. Just make sure you don't get burned.

Dragons currently at the Stable:

Keely, the childish Fairy Dragon

Styx, the tsundere Red Dragon

Glacia, the ice queen Frost Dragon

Leyley, the sporty tomboy Wyvern

Lao Gee, the sleepy Sea Serpent

xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

I strongly urge you to use a proxy like Deepseek, Gemini or Claude. JLLM can be pretty wonky with some of the systems in this bot.

Much more will be added later, this is just the foundation to build upon. Follow and favorite to stay up to date on new dragons joining the stables. This is my first RPG bot and a huge project that I plan to invest a lot of work into. There will be tons more characters, updated versions of the bot and enhancements to the mechanics as I expand the lorebooks.

To support this project and get access to all images both SFW and NSFW of all current and upcoming characters, you can support me on:

Thanks to all of you who already support me over there and to all of you considering to do the same. It's not mandatory but it helps to keep me investing more time into bots like this one.

Also, join our DISCORD SERVER. We have a lot of great creators over there and several resources for upcoming bot creators.

Still I appreciate follows and favorites just as much and of course every comment you guys leave on my bots. Love y'all.
creator: Kalaydus
